arts.ttl: Match Awards from Bayern Munich’s 4-0 victory against FC Heidenheim
arts.sum: Missing five big chances and being as wasteful as ever, Bayern continue to be a great team but with a couple of severe weaknesses namely finishing and set-pieces. Dier himself fumbled in covering his attacker, but overall he gets the award for doing his job as the core around which the Bayern defence played.

arts.ttl: Leaders Bayern Munich extend lead with commanding win at Heidenheim
arts.sum: Bayern Munich earned a convincing 4-0 victory against Heidenheim thanks to goals from Harry Kane, Konrad Laimer, Kingsley Coman and Joshua Kimmich, with Vincent Kompany's men momentarily moving nine points clear at the league summit as a result. Bayern Munich players Harry Kane (l.), Aleksandar Pavlović, and Kingsley Coman celebrate one of their four goals in a dominant performance against Heidenheim - THOMAS KIENZLE

arts.ttl: Comfortable win for Bayern in Heidenheim
arts.sum: Bayern beat Heidenheim 4-0 in a dominant performance after European exit.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich not interested in selling Joao Palhinha, yet will entertain offers for Kim Min-jae
arts.sum: When it comes to two big money flops at FC Bayern Munich, there's new news to report.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich eye Chelsea midfielder enjoying a standout season on loan - but Enzo Maresca wants him back this summer
arts.sum: As Mail Sport reported earlier this week, Enzo Maresca is expected to utilise the midfielder when Chelsea play at the upcoming World Club Championship in June.

arts.ttl: Everton v Manchester City, Brentford v Brighton, Barcelona v Celta Vigo – live
arts.sum: Join Rob Smyth for updates from Saturday action around Europe with our clockwatch

arts.ttl: Dubious stat: Jonas Urbig still searching for his first Bundesliga clean sheet at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Jonas Urbig is the first Bayern goalkeeper not to keep a clean sheet in his first 5 Bundesliga games for the club pic.twitter.com/VUV1pAR8H5 Look...it’s not great but as any Bayern fans know, the entire team has been through it in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: 'Contact made' as Blues consider Bayern Munich defender
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly make contact with the representatives of a Bayern Munich defender as they consider whether to make an approach for the international.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Christoph Freund talks shattered dreams, depth at striker
arts.sum: Like many fans of the club, Bayern Munich sporting director Christoph Freund lamented the broken dreams that came along with being eliminated from the Champions League by Inter Milan . We have a big goal for the next few weeks: to win back the Bundesliga title.”

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany backs Bayern Munich’s Jonas Urbig to deliver
arts.sum: Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany thinks the young goalkeeper is up to the task. Neuer will return soon enough, but until that happens, Bayern Munich is in good hands with Urbig.
